author: peter.davies
content: It was straightforward to create them intentionally before Spurious Dragon. But the reason 28 exist is because prior to homestead if the code deploy step of `CREATE` ran out of gas, the contract would just get created but with no code. So 28 people screwed up their contract deployment gas calculations.

author: peter.davies
content: I support the EIP. Mostly because this keeps coming up and wasting peoples brain space.

author: jochembrouwer
content:
Ah right, I forgot about this code deposit check lol. Funny rules.
I think we should bump the nonce and get over with it. First draft of EIP removes storage but this is more invasive and might set a weird precedent.
